notes: Using the launch option of PROTON_USE_WINED3D does allow my GTX 570 to launch the game and show the Gameloft logo and the mouse cursor is changed to the in-game one. Afterwards, it changes to the loading screen and shows it at 10% progress and then crashes.
title: Modern Combat 5

notes: Gameloft logo appears and swiftly progresses to displaying the loading screen, but after that the game gets stuck at around 10% of the progress bar and crashes.
title: Modern Combat 5

notes: The game launches to loading screen with a progress bar and crashes around 10% loading.
